portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.description: A collection of projects I've worked on, from personal experiments to production applications. Each project represents a unique challenge and learning experience.

journey.title: My Journey: From Factory Floors to Global AI Strategy

foundation.title: The Foundation: Logic & Precision
foundation.content: My career didn't start in the cloud; it started on the factory floor. For over a decade, I worked in Industrial Automation, mastering the precision of PLCs, SCADA systems, and robotics for companies like Fiat and Schneider Electric. This period taught me that a "bug" in the real world has physical consequences. It instilled in me a disciplined, systems-thinking approach where reliability wasn't optional—it was critical.

pivot.title: The Pivot: Building the Digital Bridge
pivot.content: Driven by a curiosity for broader systemic impact, I transitioned into Software Engineering and Systems Engineering. I moved from wiring circuits to wiring complex applications, working as a Full-Stack Developer with Java, Spring Boot, and React. I realized that writing code was powerful, but shipping it efficiently was the real bottleneck. This insight launched my deep dive into DevOps, SRE, and Cloud Architecture.

scale.title: The Scale: Cloud Native & DevOps Mastery
scale.content: At companies like Banco Inter, Queima Diária, and CI&T, I specialized in scaling infrastructure. I didn't just build systems; I engineered the platforms that allowed them to survive. I led the adoption of Infrastructure as Code (Terraform), defined multi-region strategies, and built high-performance DevOps teams from the ground up. I learned to balance cost, performance, and the intricate "12 Factor" methodologies required for modern cloud-native applications.

present.title: The Present: Strategic Leadership & AI Innovation
present.content: Today, as a Senior Manager and Tech Chapter Lead at BCG (Boston Consulting Group), I operate at the frontier of technology. My focus has shifted from managing servers to managing vision. I lead diverse, global teams in building GenAI and LLM solutions, bridging the gap between complex technical possibilities and strategic business value. I am no longer just the engineer who solves the problem; I am the leader who defines how we solve it, empowering teams to innovate with confidence.
